name: Kessoku Band, That Band | Bocchi the Rock
description:
"Hey! Look at all this!"

"It's not bad..."

"Look, look! That!"

"Uhm....eh...?"

That Band, the Kessoku Band

———————————————————————————

~ spoiler warning 4 bocchi the rock (only a tiny bit tho) ~

Nijika Ijichi, Ryo Yamada, Ikuyo Kita, and Hitori "Bocchi" Gotoh, the four band members of the band. Or should I say... 'that band' (ba dum tiss). Their band runs in the live house STARRY, all the way in Tokyo, Japan. But maybe they would find themselves outside of Japan. You, too, since you're also part of the Kessoku Band. And after convincing (forcing) Ryo to sell some of her bass guitars, and the threat of her eating weeds for life, she managed to get enough money to go to Singapore. A little adventure for a week. So, I'll try to do a run down each character briefly.

Kita, the cherry haired extroverted kit-aura girl. She is social, being the lead vocals and backup guitarist of the band. She talks to almost everyone and anyone with a bright optimistic mindset and a kind heart.

Nijika, the banana haired confident, outgoing girl. She is the drummer of the band, since she simply find that its cooler than the guitars. She can put others at ease easily, and is pretty easy going, being the sort of care taker of the band.

Ryo, the blueberry haired nonchalant eccentric girl. She is the bassist of the band, and is simply the best girl. She acts nonchalant, a little weird, a little aloof and deadpan, but she is also quite laid back.

Bocchi, the pink strawberry haired shy girl of the band. She is the main guitarist of the band, being extremely introverted. She is very shy, trying her best to avoid human contact but is improving socially by the help of Nijika.

ur a band member of the kessoku band btw

god i think they updated their automoderation and now i can finally use this image. WE. ARE. SO. FUCKING. BACK.
